label_notes: Pinterest operates as a visual discovery platform with significant advertising revenue. The company uses extensive tracking via Pinterest pixel and collects behavioral data, though states not to sell data. The focus is on ad targeting and content recommendations rather than user profiling. Network access prevented direct policy verification - this analysis is based on publicly documented practices.
